specs.title: cp-000: Marqueerubber-band selection by dragging on empty canvas area
cp-001: Tab cycles to next block ShiftTab cycles to previous
cp-002: CmdA selects all blocks on the active slide
cp-003: Escape deselects all or exits editing mode first
cp-004: Double-click a textbulletsquote block to enter inline edit mode
cp-005: Editing state tracked globally for keyboard shortcuts awareness
cp-006: Click outside the editing block to exit edit mode
cp-007: Escape exits edit mode
cp-008: Drag blocks to reposition them on the canvas
cp-009: Resize handles on selected blocks
cp-010: Multi-block group move drag one selected block all move together
cp-011: Grid snap when snapToGrid is enabled
cp-012: Position values in percentage-based coordinates 0100
cp-013: Cmd Bring Forward
cp-014: CmdShift Bring to Front
cp-015: Cmd Send Backward
cp-016: CmdShift Send to Back
cp-017: CmdL Toggle lock on selected block
cp-018: Locked blocks cannot be moved resized or deleted
cp-019: Lockunlock icons displayed on locked blocks
cp-020: CmdC Copy selected blocks
cp-021: CmdX Cut selected blocks
cp-022: CmdV Paste blocks from clipboard
cp-023: DeleteBackspace Delete selected blocks respects lock
cp-024: Context menu appears at cursor position
cp-025: Contains block-specific actions copy cut delete z-order lock
cp-026: Submenu support with hover-reveal
cp-027: Escape or click outside closes the menu
cp-028: Scroll closes the menu
cp-029: Opened from context menu Regenerate with AI
cp-030: Instruction text input
cp-031: Tone selector RegenerateTone
cp-032: Submit regenerates the slide content
cp-033: Dialog closes on cancel or after successful regeneration
cp-034: Toggle rulers onoff from canvas controls
